evidence: I am a big scifi fan and am willing to grant a movie a good bit of poetic license to make the story more interesting.
Great heist flick with some plot twists that will keep you guessing.
Everytime you think you have figured out what is going on, the plot takes a twist to show you were wrong.
This movie is fast paced with surprising plot twists.
Great special effects but totally implausible plot.
The 2012 version had by far the better action and special effects.
Great Jason Statham and Guy Ritchie collaboration.
If you liked the Jason Statham Transporter movies, you will like this one.
Good SciFi with good special effects.
I prefer movies where the good guys win and the bad guys lose.
Not a bad move with some interesting plot twists.

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced action and sci-fi films with complex narratives and plot twists. They show a preference for visual spectacle and have a notable loyalty to creators like Jason Statham and Guy Ritchie, but they are less focused on emotional depth in their viewing experience.
